page: Microsoft Azure E8nds_v6 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the Endv6 server family. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 8 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration includes 472 GB of local storage and is premium storage capable. As a network-optimized instance, it is designed to handle higher network throughput requirements. It does not include any dedicated graphics processing units.

The high memory-to-vCPU ratio provides qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring substantial memory footprints without needing excessive compute cores. This resource balance makes the instance suitable for memory-intensive applications, database hosting, network-heavy operations, and enterprise workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure E8nds_v6 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine within the network-optimized Endv6 family. Powered by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance provides 8 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 64.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The server features 472 GB of local storage and supports premium storage configurations, though it lacks dedicated GPU hardware. This resource allocation offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-heavy operations that do not require proportional scaling of compute cores. The hardware profile is optimized for database hosting, network-intensive applications, and enterprise workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E8nds_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine featuring 8 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 64.0 GB of RAM, and 472 GB of local storage, optimized for memory-intensive and network-heavy database workloads.

tagline: A network-optimized virtual machine featuring a high memory-to-core ratio and dedicated local storage for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
